code:
data Bucket
  mut tokens: Int
end

fn allow(_ bucket: Bucket) -> Bool
  mut b = bucket
  if b.tokens >= 1
    b.tokens = b.tokens - 1
    true
  else
    false
  end
end

let bucket = Bucket(tokens: 3)
mut i = 0
while i < 5
  if allow(bucket)
    println("ALLOW")
  else
    println("DENY")
  end
  i = i + 1
end
